name: Sovereign Cloud
description: European data sovereignty through T Cloud Public, Open Sovereign Cloud (OSC), and sovereign variants of Google Cloud and AWS — fully operated within the EU, compliant with BaFin, KRITIS, and GDPR requirements. Purpose-built for regulated industries (finance, healthcare, public sector) that cannot accept non-EU data processing.
positioning: The only hyperscaler-grade sovereign cloud backed by Deutsche Telekom's infrastructure and EU-only operations. Competes on trust and compliance where AWS/Azure cannot self-certify.
competitive_moat: EU-jurisdiction guarantee, Deutsche Telekom brand trust, BSI C5 and TISAX certifications
